history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left interior cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The cell below me is open, so I should turn right to face down and begin moving along the left safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the upper-left interior area facing down. The cell directly ahead is open, while the right side is lava and the lower corridor on the left remains traversable toward the goal area. The best immediate move is to continue downward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is open, and moving downward along the left corridor is the safe path toward the lower rows and then right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at the left side. The cell directly in front of me is open, while the cells to the right are blocked by lava. The safe path starts by moving downward along the left corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side of the corridor facing down. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open path goes to my right along the bottom-left area, so I should turn to face that direction first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right at the left end of a row blocked by lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path is above me, so I should turn to face upward and go around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Iâ€™m at the left side facing up. The cell in front of me is open, while the path to the goal requires first moving upward along this safe column before turning later. So the best next step is to advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up with a wall directly above me, so moving forward is blocked. The open path continues to my right along the left corridor, so I should turn right to face that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but there is lava immediately in front of me. The safe path begins by going upward along the left corridor, so I should turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing up, with a wall directly above me, so moving forward is blocked. The open path goes downward along my column, so I should turn around to eventually head down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left at the wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open path goes upward from my current position, which will start me toward the goal while avoiding lava. To face upward from left, I should turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up with a wall directly ahead, so moving forward is blocked. The open path is to my right, so I should rotate to face that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but there is lava immediately to my right, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path goes upward from my current position, so I should turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up with a wall directly above, so moving forward is blocked. The open path from my position goes to the right, so I should turn to face that direction first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path goes upward from my current position, so I should turn left to face that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Iâ€™m at the left side facing up. The cell ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open path goes downward from here, so I should turn around; the first step is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path is above me, so I should turn left to face upward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column 2 facing up. Forward is open and moving upward along the left corridor helps me avoid the lava barrier to the right, so the best next step is to continue straight.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing up, with a wall directly above me, so moving forward is blocked. The open path goes downward along my column, so I should turn around; the first step is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 2 facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The path downward is open and leads around the lava barrier, so I should first turn to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 2 facing down. The cell in front of me is open, and moving downward leads into the open corridor toward the lower part of the map, which is the safest progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while turning or moving elsewhere is unnecessary right now. Advancing downward moves me toward the open corridor leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing down, with a wall directly below me. The open path goes upward from my current column, so I should first turn to face right and then continue navigating around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right toward a continuous stretch of lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path is above me, so I should turn left to face upward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left side facing up, with a clear vertical corridor above me. Moving forward is safe and advances me toward the open upper area, while turning would not help immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
